name: PHI_DIRICHLET_FULL_NATURAL_COMPLEMENT
allowed_delta_h: delta_phi=0; common-scale, angular-shape, and off-diagonal tangents otherwise free
allowed_delta_K: all components free including reciprocal normal derivative
natural_equations: project bare Pi_h and E onto every allowed tangent and set those projections zero
corner_rule: free corner tangents require projected bare corner flux zero
unforced_addition: choice to leave every unsealed tangent natural

name: PHI_DIRICHLET_FIXED_ANGULAR_SHAPE
allowed_delta_h: delta_phi=0; angular trace-free and off-diagonal tangents fixed; common-scale tangent retained as bare null
allowed_delta_K: all components free including reciprocal normal derivative
natural_equations: E projections vanish for free delta K; Pi_h imposed only on remaining free non-null delta h tangents
corner_rule: fixed non-CSN corner shape removes its variation; common-scale corner tangent is bare null
unforced_addition: choice to fix transverse conformal shape

name: PHI_DIRICHLET_MIXED_AFTER_COMPLETION
allowed_delta_h: delta_phi=0; declared mixed metric momentum data
allowed_delta_K: all reciprocal derivative values remain admissible under declared Legendre polarization
natural_equations: depends on separately derived integrable boundary functional
unforced_addition: boundary/Legendre functional absent from current UDT
